Formulár, ktorý si odoslal, mal chýbajúc:
The form you submitted had a missing or invalid security token
(CSRF). This usually happens when a page has been open too long or was
submitted twice.
Refresh the page and try the action again.
BudgetPilot ukladá osobné finančné údaje: BudgetPilot stores personal financial data. Create a local administrator account before use. Do not expose the application directly to the public internet.
Ak chceš vzdialený prístup, použi VPN al: For remote access, use a VPN or Tailscale. HTTPS or Docker alone are not authentication.
Prihlás sa do lokálnej inštancie BudgetP: Log in to the local BudgetPilot instance.
Používateľské meno musí mať aspoň 3 znak: Username must be at least 3 characters.
Password must be at least 10 characters.
Príliš veľa neúspešných pokusov. Skús to: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
Reálny zostatok, otvorené platby, obálky: Real balance, open payments, envelopes, and recent activity in one place.
Pracovný zoznam povinností: zaplatiť, od: Work list of obligations: pay, defer, edit, or change status.
Platby s novým termínom, rozdelené podľa: Payments with a new due date, grouped by when they need attention again.
Mesačné limity a priebeh míňania podľa k: Monthly limits and spending progress by category.
Rýchle ručné výdavky a ich história za a: Quick manual expenses and their history for the current data.
Nahraj účtenku, skontroluj rozpoznanú su: Upload a receipt, review the detected amount, and save it as an expense.
Časová os zmien v zostatku, platbách, vý: Timeline of balance, payment, expense, and envelope changes.
Nastavenia, platobné šablóny, dlhy, hist: Settings, payment templates, debts, history, and diagnostics in one place.
Účet, rezerva, príjem a diagnostika dát: Account, reserve, income, and application data diagnostics.
Pokojný prehľad toho, čo treba zaplatiť: A calm overview of what needs to be paid and what remains for everyday spending.
Stačí aktuálny stav účtu a pravidelné pl: Enter the current account balance and recurring payments so the overview starts making sense.
Mám reálnu rezervu bokom: I keep a real reserve aside
Rezerva zostane bokom a nebude sa miešať: The reserve stays aside and will not be mixed into everyday spending money.
Zmena mena alebo hesla vyžaduje aktuálne: Changing the username or password requires the current password. The password is stored only as a hash.
The current password is not correct.
Používateľské meno môže obsahovať iba pí: Username may contain only letters, numbers, a dot, a hyphen, and an underscore.
Ak meníš iba používateľské meno, nechaj: If you are changing only the username, leave the new password blank.
Rozpoznaná suma je len návrh. Pred ulože: The detected amount is only a suggestion. You will always review and can correct it before saving.
Odhad z OCR — over si sumu a dátum, prir: OCR estimate: verify the amount and date, assign a category, and only then save it as an expense.
Ak už na túto kategóriu obálka existuje,: If an envelope already exists for this category, saving only overwrites its limit.
Na pokrytie nezaplatených platieb a obál: To cover unpaid payments and envelopes, you still need
Po započítaní otvorených platieb a zostá: After open payments and remaining envelopes, you have left
Odhad po najbližšej výplate (vrátane bud: Estimate after next payday (including future income)
Orientácia na najbližšie mesiace. Je to: A guide for the next months. This is a full-month plan, not money available to spend today.
Keď platbu odložíš, dashboard tu ukáže n: When you defer a payment, the dashboard will show the next new due date here.
Nothing is waiting to be paid.
Otvorené platby v aktuálnom cykle sa zob: Open payments in the current cycle will appear in this work list.
Nothing has been paid in this cycle yet.
Potvrdené platby sa sem presunú po zmene: Confirmed payments move here after their status changes.
Menej časté úpravy sú tu, aby denné obra: Less frequent changes live here so daily screens stay calm: payment templates, one-time obligations, debts, income, history, and diagnostics.
These cards manage future templates. Status still applies only to the current cycle
Jednorazová platba sa zaráta do prehľadu: A one-time payment is counted in the month when it is due.
Zatiaľ žiadna jednorazová platba tento m: No one-time payment this month yet.
Čo dlžíš ty, znižuje dostupné peniaze. Č: What you owe reduces available money. What should come to you is only a note until it actually arrives in the account.
Deferred payments stay under control. When their date arrives, they return to unpaid.
Odložené platby po termíne sa vrátia do: Deferred payments past their new due date return to attention here.
Najbližšie odložené záväzky sa zobrazia: Upcoming deferred obligations will appear in this section.
Vzdialenejšie termíny budú v tomto zozna: More distant due dates will appear in this list.
Odložené položky sa zobrazia podľa novéh: Deferred items appear by their new due date.
Zatiaľ tu nie sú žiadne ručne pridané vý: There are no manually added expenses yet.
Nový výdavok pridáš cez rýchly formulár: Add a new expense with the quick form in the actions panel.
Zatiaľ žiadna obálka. Pridaj limit pre k: No envelope yet. Add a category limit on the left.
Príjem je voliteľný. Prehľad počíta hlav: Income is optional. The overview mainly calculates from the current account balance and payments.
Presný rozpad čísel z dashboardu: účet,: Exact dashboard number breakdown: account, unpaid payments, payments outside the balance, envelopes, and data warnings.
Zálohy vznikajú pred úplným resetom a pr: Backups are created before a full reset and before every restore. Restore overwrites current data, so it requires a confirmation code.
Pred obnovou vznikla aktuálna pre-restor: A current pre-restore backup was created before restoring.
The code did not match, so restore did not start.
The selected backup could not be restored.
Prvá záloha vznikne automaticky pred res: The first backup is created automatically before reset or restore.
